name: McClure, Dannie M.
description: A quiet, well behaved, modest girl, who will be an example for all who come in contact with her. Will make a fine teacher. Good in millinery.

name: Rowe, Rebecca
description: Rebecca is our rollicking Indiana girl, jolly and good natured. She is one of the scholastic stars of the class; ambitious and enthusiastic in all her undertakings. Especially good with the ukulele.

name: Dean, Edward E.
description: Dean is one of our manly young men—obliging and polite. We predict a bright future for him. He will make a good dentist.

name: Owens, Chalmer T.
description: Owens is a soldier from his heart. To know Owens is to like him.

name: Caldwell, Lillian
motto: "Let us seek to reign nobly on the throne of our highest self for just a single day, filling every moment of every hour with our finest, unselfish best."
description: Timid, sweet disposition, unassuming.

name: Stewart, Margaret
description: Margaret is a true daughter of the Blue Grass Section. Her scholarly attainments, combined with her vivacity, will make for us a fine teacher and a leader of the race.

name: Bell, James H.
description: Serious, stable, and of a kindly disposition. He is a loyal member of the Senior Class.

name: Perkins, Frank V.
description: "A smile that never wears off" is his, thus proving a congenial, cheerful disposition. Quite a popular young man.

name: Jones, Eva
description: Eva is a splendid "all around" girl, possessing the qualifications of the athletic, business, professional and home making girl. She is especially good in elocution.

name: VanCleave, Elizabeth
description: Elizabeth is the kind that makes school worth while. Having lived her babyhood days on Normal, her inherent tendencies to roam sometimes bring upon her censure; though incurable, she is harmless and her sweet face and lovely disposition have made her a favorite. Good in sewing.

name: Rhodes, Sara
description: Miss Rhodes came to us late, but it is a privilege to know her. Her scholarly habits and beautiful Christian life have endeared her to us. She won second honor.

name: Williams, Warren C.
description: Warren is an unusually neat fellow and one always ready to "lend a hand." He has a very friendly disposition.

name: Evlyn, Mark
motto: "Purpose at its best must be alone and beyond us like the polar star that guides and inspires the compass of the mariner."
description: Excellent student, alert and interesting.

name: Elizabeth, Parker
motto: "The great thing in life is not in realizing a purpose but fighting for it."
description: Conscientious, positive and earnest.

name: Mabel, Denny
motto: "A smile, a touch of human kindness, an unexpected bit of tenderness and courtesy will accomplish wonders."
description: Demure, good tempered—quite a favorite.

name: Ann, Hampton
description: Ann is an "all around" good girl. One in whom you can confide. Will make a fine teacher of Mathematics. Good in music.

name: Williams, Katherine
description: A gentle, modest, sympathetic and unassuming girl. Loved and trusted by all. Especially good in English.

name: Jett, L. B.
description: A fine manly fellow, who always stands for the right, and is highly thought of by both students and teachers. He is Valedictorian of his class.

name: Cooksey, James F.
description: He is complaisant and possesses many fine qualities of manhood. He was one of the many called to the training camp during the war and we were glad to welcome him back.

name: Lane, Hazel F.
description: Hazel is a lovely girl of a beautiful personality. Her fate was decided when she became "Mrs. Lane." For her we predict the model housekeeper with all of its "accessories."

name: Hickman, Catheryn Nichols
description: One of our very best girls—a good student and a perfect lady. She has won many friends on the "Hill"—she knows when and how to smile.

name: McIntyre, Sue Clia
motto: "Optimism seeks to discover the good points in the acts of those around us; to let their little weaknesses and failings fade into nothingness in the shadow of our charity."
description: Solemn, sincere and kind.

name: Black, Mary C.
description: A calm, dignified young lady. A model for fashion and neatness. Will make a model housekeeper. Especially good in Domestic Science.

name: Leavell, Maurice M.
description: Favorite expression: Now listen. Best Friend: Science. Pastime: Flirting. Chief characteristic: Gallantry.

name: Jackson, Jennie Lou
description: Favorite expression: Excuse me church I didn't know you were crowded. Best friend: Cicero. Pastime: Fixing cook book. Chief characteristic: Gentleness.

name: Fleming, Catherine
description: Favorite expression: Ah girl. Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Talking. Chief characteristic: Twisting.

name: Russell, Willie P.
description: Favorite expression: Of all the things. Best friend: Cicero. Pastime: Reading. Chief characteristic: Quiet disposition.

name: Griffey, J. Polk
description: Best Friend: Politics. Pastime: Reading and arguing. Chief Characteristic: Jazzing.

name: Head, Stella Mae
description: Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Studying. Chief characteristic: That twisting hike.

name: Green, Evelyn
description: Best friend: French. Pastime: Making eyes. Chief characteristic: Strutting.

name: Board, Earl
description: Best Friend: Agriculture. Pastime: Flirting. Chief characteristic: Gallantry.

name: Britt, Juliet
description: Best friend: Cicero. Pastime: Talking. Chief characteristic: Her bass voice.

name: Farrow, Blanche
description: Best Friend: Novel Pastime: Reading Chief characteristic: Sweet disposition

name: Miller, Marian Louise
description: Best friend: Cicero Pastime: Reading good literature Chief characteristic: Gentleness

name: Logan, Nellie
description: Best friend: French Pastime: Talking of the gone Ellis Chief characteristic: Laughing

name: Stone, Gertrude
description: Favorite expression: Hush. Best friend: English. Pastime: Crocheting. Chief characteristic: Oratorical ability.

name: Holland, Florence
description: Favorite expression: Child. Best friend: Cicero. Pastime: Crocheting. Chief characteristic: Smiling.

name: Phillips, Bettie
description: Favorite expression: You had better go on now. Best friend: Sociology. Pastime: Work. Chief characteristic: Hot temper.

name: Reed, Claudia
description: Favorite expression: Oh Shoot! Best friend: Tennis. Pastime: Kodaking. Chief characteristic: A noble heart.

name: Murray, Lillian
description: Favorite expression: Oh! listen here girl! Best friend: Sociology Pastime: Talking of Louisville Chief characteristic: Talking

name: Hughes, Ada
description: Favorite expression: Believe me, I am Best friend: A Novel Pastime: Sewing (I don't think) Chief characteristic: Talking fast

name: Franklin, Jane
description: Favorite expression: Let me tell you something Best friend: Geometry Pastime: Washing and ironing Chief characteristic: Talking

name: Blandford, Oddie
description: Favorite expression: You see Best friend: Sociology Pastime: Crocheting Chief characteristic: Friendly disposition

name: McElroy, Mattie
description: Favorite expression: Oh now—Hush! Best Friend: Millinery. Pastime: Making hats. Chief characteristic: Friend-winning air.

name: Letcher, Susie
description: Favorite expression: Well I may be wrong. Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Crocheting. Chief characteristic: Strutting.

name: Morgan, Christine
description: Favorite expression: Now let me tell you. Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Resting as some may call it. Chief characteristic: Nervousness.

name: Wilson, Esther
description: Favorite expression: Why do you say that? Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Reading. Chief characteristic: Sweet disposition.

name: Howard, Virginia O.
description: Favorite expression: Oh! you got everything. Best friend: Novel. Pastime: Flirting. Chief characteristic: Generosity.

name: Mason, Nannie E.
description: Favorite expression: Well I wouldn't know. Best friend: English and Sociology. Pastime: Making ugly faces. Chief characteristic: Jollity.

name: Pritchett, Vaden
description: Favorite expression: Don't that jar you. Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Playing the piano. Chief characteristic: Her tenor voice.

name: Calbert, Mary A.
description: Favorite expression: Me too. Best friend: Novels 5c a grab. Pastime: Wanting more (Moore). Chief characteristic: That lame hike.

name: Trumbo, Carlie B.
description: Best friend: Music. Pastime: Playing classical music. Chief characteristic: Talent for music.

name: Johnson, Ruth Anna
description: Best friend: Novel. Pastime: Jazzing around. Chief characteristic: Sunny Smiles.

name: Hayes, Elizabeth
description: Best friend: Novel. Pastime: Reading classical literature. Chief characteristic: Mild temper.

name: Bruen, Vernoca Mae
description: Best friend: English. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: A sweet soprano voice.

name: Hart, Addie Laide
description: Favorite expression: Say child. Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Crocheting. Chief characteristic: Hair dressing.

name: Moore, Mary E.
description: Favorite expression: Oh! Honey. Best friend: Pantry. Pastime: Making frames for hats. Chief characteristic: Obedience.

name: Taylor, Anna B.
description: Favorite expression: How is that? Best friend: English. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: Good nature.

name: Holmes, Mary C.
description: Favorite expression: Oh well. Best friend: Literature. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: A noble heart.

name: Olinger, John B.
description: Best friend: Athletics. Pastime: Flirting. Chief characteristic: His oratorical ability.

name: Fisher, Birdell
description: Best friend: Cicero. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: Talking.

name: Wilson, Alene
description: Best friend: English. Pastime: Primping. Chief characteristic: Making fun.

name: Croley, William
description: Best friend: M. Drawing. Pastime: Talking about nature. Chief characteristic: Good disposition.

name: Massie, James
description: Favorite expression: Let me see. Best friend: French. Pastime: Talking. Chief characteristic: Boyish air.

name: May, Catherine
description: Favorite expression: Now ain't that a dog? Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Reading old letters (love). Chief characteristic: Kindness.

name: Anderson, Nettie Mae
description: Favorite expression: Ain't she macking. Best friend: Novel (10c). Pastime: Flirting. Chief characteristic: Fussing—and she can go some.

name: Board, Elliot
description: Favorite expression: Isn't she (Chlora) cute? Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Grinning. Chief characteristic: That hike.

name: Tinsley, Charles
description: Best friend: Physics. Pastime: Studying electricity. Chief characteristic: Mild temper.

name: Franklin, Mary
description: Best friend: English. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: Good disposition.

name: Clayborne, Geneva B.
description: Best friend: English. Pastime: Reading Novels. Chief characteristic: Cool temper.

name: Buckner, Luther
description: Best friend: Geometry. Pastime: Acting a monkey. Chief characteristic: His jollity.

name: Alcorn, Viola
description: Favorite expression: Oh! let me see. Best friend: Fashion plate. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: Kindness.

name: Perry, Mabel
description: Favorite expression: I don't know. Best friend: Domestic Science. Pastime: Sewing. Chief characteristic: A kind heart.
